data.title: Two-Factor Authentication
data.description: Enhanced account security requiring user identification through a second factor beyond passwords.
data.technical_spec: SMS codes, authenticator apps, hardware security keys.

data.title: Encryption
data.description: Data encryption in transit and at rest prevents unauthorized access and ensures privacy.

data.title: Security Keys
data.description: Physical security keys to prevent phishing and account takeovers.
data.technical_spec: FIDO U2F keys, Titan Security Keys.

data.title: Automated Threat Detection
data.description: AI-powered systems to automatically detect and mitigate potential cybersecurity threats.
data.technical_spec: Google Safe Browsing, AI pattern recognition.

data.title: Bug Bounty Program
data.description: A program incentivizing external security researchers to report vulnerabilities.
data.technical_spec: Vulnerability disclosure policies, rewards scaling with severity.
